ADD.summary: Store a value only if the key does not already exist.

APPEND.summary: Append data to an existing key.

CACHE_MEMLIMIT.summary: Set the memory limit in megabytes at runtime.

CAS.summary: Store a value only if it has not been changed since the given CAS value.

DECR.summary: Decrement the numeric value of a key.

FLUSH_ALL.summary: Invalidate all existing items, optionally after a delay.

GAT.summary: Get one or more keys and update their expiration time.

GATS.summary: Get one or more keys with their CAS value and update their expiration time.

GET.summary: Retrieve the value of one or more keys.

GETS.summary: Retrieve one or more keys together with their CAS value.

INCR.summary: Increment the numeric value of a key.

LRU_CRAWLER.args: CRAWL | DISABLE | ENABLE | METADUMP | MGDUMP | SLEEP | TOCRAWL

LRU_CRAWLER CRAWL.summary: Start crawling the given slab classes.

LRU_CRAWLER METADUMP.summary: Dump metadata for all matching keys.

LRU_CRAWLER MGDUMP.summary: Dump keys in meta format for all matching keys.

LRU_CRAWLER SLEEP.summary: Set the crawler sleep time between items.

LRU_CRAWLER TOCRAWL.summary: Set the maximum number of items to crawl per slab.

MA.summary: Meta arithmetic: increment or decrement a key with optional meta flags.

MD.summary: Meta delete: delete a key with optional meta flags.

ME.summary: Meta debug: show metadata for a key.

MG.summary: Meta get: retrieve a key with optional meta flags.

MN.summary: Meta no-op, returns MN. Used to end a pipeline of meta commands.

MS.summary: Meta set: store a key with optional meta flags.

PREPEND.summary: Prepend data to an existing key.

REPLACE.summary: Store a value only if the key already exists.

SET.summary: Store a value, overwriting any existing one.

SLABS AUTOMOVE.summary: Set the automatic slab page reassignment mode.

SLABS REASSIGN.summary: Move a memory page from one slab class to another.

STATS.summary: Show general statistics or a sub-category.

STATS CACHEDUMP.summary: Dump up to <limit> keys from the given slab class.

STATS ITEMS.summary: Show statistics about stored items per slab.

STATS SIZES.summary: Show a histogram of item sizes (locks the cache while running).

TOUCH.summary: Update the expiration time of a key.
